topic: My porch light burns out every night and is replaced with a warmer bulb by morning.
title: Someone Keeps Changing My Porch Light | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my porch light was a different bulb than the one I installed.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim front porch at dawn with a glowing bulb in a brass fixture, fog on the lawn, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I rented a small house at the end of a quiet street.
scenes.image_prompt: A modest single story house at the end of an empty residential street, twilight, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked that light each night before bed.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand near a wall switch beside a darkened front door, dim hallway light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The cold white bulb I bought always became a warm amber glow.
scenes.image_prompt: A warm amber porch bulb glowing against pale blue dawn, soft fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
An unmade bed by a window showing faint dawn light, deep shadow, grainy, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The dead bulbs sat lined on my step, all six in a row.
scenes.image_prompt: Six burnt out lightbulbs lined neatly on a concrete porch step, early gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked the new bulb with a tiny scratch.
scenes.image_prompt: A close view of a lightbulb base with a faint scratch mark, dim workbench light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By sunrise my scratch was gone and the glass felt warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A smooth unscratched bulb glowing softly in a porch fixture at sunrise, warm light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I sat in the dark window and waited all night, watching.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette seated at a dark interior window looking out at a lit porch, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At three the light went out, and when it returned the bulb was already warmer.
scenes.image_prompt: A porch fixture mid flicker between dark and a warm amber glow, heavy night fog, streetlight haze, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Nobody crossed the lawn. I never saw a single footprint.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty dew covered lawn at dawn with no footprints leading to a porch, soft gray fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My landlord said the last tenant changed it too. He never left either.
scenes.image_prompt: A faded For Rent sign tilted in an overgrown yard before a dim house, twilight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
